questions.question: State the necessary and sufficient conditions for an undirected graph to have an Eulerian circuit. (3 marks)
expectedPoints: All vertices must have even degree
These conditions are both necessary and sufficient

questions.question: Explain the difference between Eulerian and Hamiltonian paths, including their computational complexity and practical applications. (8 marks)
expectedPoints: Eulerian focuses on edges, Hamiltonian on vertices
Eulerian has polynomial solutions, Hamiltonian is NP-complete
Eulerian applications: route planning, network routing
Different existence conditions for each type
